'''choshawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wafery|wafery]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wafery|wafery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| choshawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:choshawithi|choshawithi]] || [[word:choshawiji|choshawiji]] || [[word:choshawishi|choshawishi]] || [[word:choshawiki|choshawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:choshawuthuthu|choshawuthuthu]] || [[word:choshawujuju|choshawujuju]] || [[word:choshawushushu|choshawushushu]] || [[word:choshawukuku|choshawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:choshawuthu|choshawuthu]] || [[word:choshawuju|choshawuju]] || [[word:choshawushu|choshawushu]] || [[word:choshawuku|choshawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:choshawufthuf|choshawufthuf]] || [[word:choshawufjuf|choshawufjuf]] || [[word:choshawufshuf|choshawufshuf]] || [[word:choshawufkuf|choshawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:choshawethe|choshawethe]] || [[word:choshaweje|choshaweje]] || [[word:choshaweshe|choshaweshe]] || [[word:choshaweke|choshaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:choshawothotho|choshawothotho]] || [[word:choshawojojo|choshawojojo]] || [[word:choshawoshosho|choshawoshosho]] || [[word:choshawokoko|choshawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:choshawotho|choshawotho]] || [[word:choshawojo|choshawojo]] || [[word:choshawosho|choshawosho]] || [[word:choshawoko|choshawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:choshawofthof|choshawofthof]] || [[word:choshawofjof|choshawofjof]] || [[word:choshawofshof|choshawofshof]] || [[word:choshawofkof|choshawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfthĂŻf|choshawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfjĂŻf|choshawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfshĂŻf|choshawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfkĂŻf|choshawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|choshawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|choshawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|choshawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|choshawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfthĂŻf|choshawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfjĂŻf|choshawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfshĂŻf|choshawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfkĂŻf|choshawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfthĂŻf|choshawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfjĂŻf|choshawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfshĂŻf|choshawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:choshawĂŻfkĂŻf|choshawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:choshawĂŠthĂŠ|choshawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:choshawĂŠjĂŠ|choshawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:choshawĂŠshĂŠ|choshawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:choshawĂŠkĂŠ|choshawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:choshawathatha|choshawathatha]] || [[word:choshawajaja|choshawajaja]] || [[word:choshawashasha|choshawashasha]] || [[word:choshawakaka|choshawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:choshawatha|choshawatha]] || [[word:choshawaja|choshawaja]] || [[word:choshawasha|choshawasha]] || [[word:choshawaka|choshawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:choshawafthaf|choshawafthaf]] || [[word:choshawafjaf|choshawafjaf]] || [[word:choshawafshaf|choshawafshaf]] || [[word:choshawafkaf|choshawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:choshawasha|choshawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:choshawshĂ«sha|choshawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choshawrosha|choshawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choshawmusha|choshawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:choshawyasha|choshawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoshawnkshĂ«sha|gochoshawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoshawnkrosha|gochoshawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoshawnkmusha|gochoshawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoshawnkyasha|gochoshawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:choshashawasha|choshashawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:choshashawshĂ«sha|choshashawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choshashawrosha|choshashawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choshashawmusha|choshashawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:choshashawyasha|choshashawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoshashawnkshĂ«sha|gochoshashawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoshashawnkrosha|gochoshashawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoshashawnkmusha|gochoshashawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoshashawnkyasha|gochoshashawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:cheshĂŠwasha|cheshĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:cheshĂŠwshĂ«sha|cheshĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:cheshĂŠwrosha|cheshĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:cheshĂŠwmusha|cheshĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:cheshĂŠwyasha|cheshĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocheshĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|gocheshĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gocheshĂŠwnkrosha|gocheshĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocheshĂŠwnkmusha|gocheshĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gocheshĂŠwnkyasha|gocheshĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:choshfawasha|choshfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:choshfawshĂ«sha|choshfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choshfawrosha|choshfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choshfawmusha|choshfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:choshfawyasha|choshfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoshfawnkshĂ«sha|gochoshfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoshfawnkrosha|gochoshfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoshfawnkmusha|gochoshfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoshfawnkyasha|gochoshfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
